name: council-of-minds
description: Run any question, idea, or decision through a council of AI advisors who independently analyze it, peer-review each other anonymously, and synthesize a final verdict with confidence scoring and dissent preservation.
welcomeMessage: Council of Minds ready. I run your decisions through 4-6 specialized advisors who analyze independently, peer-review anonymously, and deliver a synthesized verdict. Say 'council this: [your question]' or specify a profile: engineering, strategy, product, risk, ai-ml, innovation, or creative.
